events.title: chronic kidney disease
events.event_summary: Problem-oriented bundle for chronic kidney disease.
supporting_evidence: The patient has stage three chronic kidney disease.
The doctor recommends avoiding anti-inflammatories to prevent worsening kidney function.
current_state: The patient has stage three chronic kidney disease.
The doctor recommends avoiding anti-inflammatories to prevent worsening kidney function.
planned_actions: The doctor orders lasix at eighty milligrams a day.
The doctor wants the patient to stop taking Motrin and Advil.
The doctor wants the patient to take Tylenol.
A chest x-ray will be ordered.
care_context: The patient's lasix dose will be increased to 80 milligrams per day.
